name: Bbh
notes: BBH = Bartle Bogle Hegarty. Global advertising agency founded 1982, headquartered in London, UK (part of Publicis). US office in New York but HQ is London. Domain in input 'bbh.com)' had a trailing parenthesis — resolved to bartleboglehegarty.com as the official site.
